title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at 3M India Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at 3M India Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? 3M India Healthcare in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 3M India Healthcare:
3M India Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare!
